content:
Join Whiskerburg’s next big detective in this fun hidden object adventure! Play as Kat, a brave newcomer ready to solve the town’s trickiest cases. Find hidden objects, uncover clues, and help a bunch of cute cat friends, including noble Sir Whiskers, elegant Duchess Purrcilla, and bubbly Mittens.

Each mystery you solve brings Kat closer to rising through the detective ranks and helps her fix her new office. With easy-to-play, whimsical characters and stories that are warm and funny, this cat detective adventure is sure to make you smile from beginning to end.

Download Link
